     The Numbers Business Report

John Tucker Must Die (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $41,011,711Details
International Box Office $27,812,815
Worldwide Box Office $68,824,526
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $32,847,487
Total $32,847,487
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Three teenagers two-timed by a local lothario decide to turn the tables on him in this romantic comedy. John Tucker is the big man on campus at his high school — he’s the captain and star player of the basketball team, he’s got money, he’s good-looking and charming, and he can have any girl he wants. However, the latter attribute is about to get him in serious trouble when three different girls at his school — Heather, Beth and Carrie — discover they’ve all been dating John at the same time. Determined to bring down the campus ladykiller, the girls devise a plan -- they pick a cute but socially clumsy girl who is new at school, Kate, and give her a crash course in stealing John’s heart. Once Kate has John wrapped around her little finger, she's supposed to drop him like a bad habit and give him a taste of what heartbreak is really like. However, it seems that the early stages of the plan work a little too well, and John and Kate end up falling for each other for real.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,276,534 (34.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,560 opening theaters/2,566 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $74,885,507

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 28th, 2006 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: November 14th, 2006 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content and language
Running Time: 89 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Scene in End Credits
Plot point: Basketball, Fake Dating, Infidelity, New Guy/Girl in School, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Landscape Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Three teenagers two-timed by a local lothario decide to turn the tables on him in this romantic comedy. John Tucker is the big man on campus at his high school — he’s the captain and star player of the basketball team, he’s got money, he’s good-looking and charming, and he can have any girl he wants. However, the latter attribute is about to get him in serious trouble when three different girls at his school — Heather, Beth and Carrie — discover they’ve all been dating John at the same time. Determined to bring down the campus ladykiller, the girls devise a plan -- they pick a cute but socially clumsy girl who is new at school, Kate, and give her a crash course in stealing John’s heart. Once Kate has John wrapped around her little finger, she's supposed to drop him like a bad habit and give him a taste of what heartbreak is really like. However, it seems that the early stages of the plan work a little too well, and John and Kate end up falling for each other for real.
